purpose: Minimal output-quality review cases for the skill-creator Agent Skill.
usage: Use these cases after the skill has triggered. Check whether the response produces a strong Agent Skill draft with the expected structure, boundaries, and portability discipline.

cases.query: Create a portable Agent Skill for reviewing CSV data quality issues across different agents.
Review this Agent Skill and tell me what should move from SKILL.md into references/ to improve progressive disclosure.
expected: clear judgment about what stays in SKILL.md
publication or portability concerns if relevant
must_not: generic advice with no file-level recommendations
moving core always-needed instructions out of SKILL.md
cases.why: Tests whether the skill gives concrete structural editing guidance.

cases.query: Audit this skill for publication quality and tell me what is still weak.
expected: clear list of weaknesses or pass/fail findings
must_not: ignoring trigger quality or scope boundaries
cases.why: Tests audit behavior rather than pure generation.

cases.query: Turn this one-off internal workflow into an Agent Skill, but keep it generalizable and avoid local-machine assumptions.
expected: generalized scope instead of literal one-off transcription
removal or warning about local-only assumptions
justified use or non-use of scripts/references/assets
must_not: copying one-off workflow details without generalization
cases.why: Tests whether the skill can abstract from a specific workflow into a shareable one.
